final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3×3 grid poster for 小红书 (9-panel layout) suitable for female-oriented healthy lifestyle content (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "clean, premium, healing" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 2010s Instagram lifestyle flatlay photography, MUJI brand visual heritage, Kinfolk magazine editorial design; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a standard 3×3 grid layout (3 columns × 3 rows), each panel complete and centered with clear borders/separators between panels, ready for post-production slicing into 9 individual images
Subject: must include 9 panels total:
  Panel 1 (cover): large title "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips" / subtitle "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏" / soft bed, moon, pillow, eye mask elements
  Panel 2: title "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机" / body text "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。" / phone, moon, sleepy face illustration
  Panel 3: title "2. 睡前把灯光调暗" / body text "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。" / bedside lamp, warm yellow light, curtains
  Panel 4: title "3. 房间温度别太高" / body text "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。" / air conditioner, thermometer, quilt
  Panel 5: title "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡" / body text "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。" / coffee cup, tea cup, prohibition symbol
  Panel 6: title "5. 睡前洗个热水澡" / body text "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。" / bathroom steam, towel, hot water
  Panel 7: title "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来" / body text "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。" / notebook, pen, small desk lamp
  Panel 8: title "7. 固定上床时间" / body text "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。" / clock, moon, bed
  Panel 9: title "8. 试试深呼吸放松法" / body text "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。" / bottom text "收藏这组，今晚试试看" / breathing lines, closed-eye figure, stars
Scene/backdrop: cream white, light beige, pale oatmeal, light caramel color base with soft gradient, clean background texture
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, warm, healing atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be cream white, light beige, pale oatmeal, light caramel dominant with small amounts of dark brown text — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a premium magazine-quality surface treatment with light skeuomorphic illustration accents — exact grain / sheen / weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all Chinese text as specified in each panel above
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve 3×3 grid structure with clear panel boundaries; each panel must be independently complete and centered; text must be large, readable, with comfortable whitespace; no text near divider lines
Avoid: must avoid cheap marketing aesthetic, over-decoration, garish colors, English text, garbled characters
